title: Spicy Velvety Italian Red Cabbage Stir-fry
description: This lazy-sunday Italian dish features red cabbage caramelized with a touch of heat and sweetness for a unique paleo-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: paleo-friendly soy sauce or coconut aminos
paleo-friendly Worcestershire sauce or tomato paste
paleo-friendly olive oil or avocado oil

instructions: Chop red cabbage into bite-sized pieces and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the paleo-friendly olive oil or avocado oil over the cabbage. Toss to coat evenly, then sprinkle with garlic cloves, red pepper flakes, and paleo-friendly honey or maple syrup.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the cabbage is tender and lightly caramelized.
Meanwhile, in a small bowl, whisk together the paleo-friendly soy sauce or coconut aminos, paleo-friendly Worcestershire sauce or tomato paste, and red pepper flakes. Set aside.

In a large skillet over medium-high heat, add paleo-friendly olive oil or avocado oil. Once hot, add the caramelized cabbage from the oven. Sauté for about 5 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Pour the soy sauce mixture into the skillet and continue to cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
